general.name: fluxcal
general.short: The fluxcal files store intermediate products derived during the flux calibration procedure.
general.description: The fluxcal files store intermediate products derived during the flux calibration procedure.

surveys.name: MaNGA
surveys.long: Mapping Nearby Galaxies at Apache Point Observatory
surveys.description: A wide-field optical spectroscopic IFU survey of extragalactic sources to study galaxy dynamics and kinematics

general.naming_convention: fluxcal-[camera]-[exposure].fits.gz where [camera] is one of the four cameras on the instrument, b1, r1, or b2, r2, for the blue and red cameras on each SDSS spectrograph, and [exposure] is the (zero-padded) 8-digit exposure number.

changelog.description: Describes changes to the datamodel product and/or file structure from one release to another

hdu0.name: PRIMARY
hdu0.description: HDU0 is empty except for the global header.

header.comment: Dummy primary header created by MWRFITS
No data is associated with this header

hdu1.description: Structure array containing intermediate products for flux calibration. There is one entry for each star.

header.comment: Binary table written by MWRFITS v1.11

DCNRA.name: DCNRA
DCNRA.description: Intended dither offset in RA as reported by the guider

DCNDEC.name: DCNDEC
DCNDEC.description: Intended dither offset in Dec as reported by the guider

FIBERID.name: FIBERID
FIBERID.description: fiberids for the 7 fibers on and around the star

FNUM.name: FNUM
FNUM.description: fiber numbers internal to the IFU for the 7 fibers on and around the star.

FACTOR.name: FACTOR
FACTOR.description: Best-fit scaling factor for the size of the PSF

FIBEROFFX.name: FIBEROFFX
FIBEROFFX.description: Represents the fiber's displacement along the x-direction

FIBEROFFY.name: FIBEROFFY
FIBEROFFY.description: Represents the fiber's displacement along the y-direction

OFFSETX.name: OFFSETX
OFFSETX.description: The bulk offest along the x-direction

OFFSETY.name: OFFSETY
OFFSETY.description: The bulk offest along the y-direction

SCALEBEST.name: SCALEBEST
SCALEBEST.description: Scale factor for the DAR vector

FLUXRATIO_CHI2.name: FLUXRATIO_CHI2
FLUXRATIO_CHI2.description: Chi-squared from the flux ratio fitting among the 7 fibers and in 8 wavelength bins.

MODELSPEC.name: MODELSPEC
MODELSPEC.description: Model spectrum for this star multiplied with the derived PSF-covering fraction as a function of wavelength.

FLUX.name: FLUX
FLUX.description: Flux for the reference fiber (first element in the fiberid and fnum arrays) in the bundle.

IVAR.name: IVAR
IVAR.description: Inverse variance for the reference fiber (first elements in the fiberid and fnum arrays).

DISP.name: DISP
DISP.description: Instrumental dispersion for the reference fiber

MRATIO.name: MRATIO
MRATIO.description: The ratio between FLUX and MODELSPEC; this is the correction vector derived from each star.

LOGLAM.name: LOGLAM
LOGLAM.description: Log10 wavelengths of the blue and red spectra of the star.

FLUXRATIO.name: FLUXRATIO
FLUXRATIO.description: The empirically observed ratio of the flux in a target fiber compared to a reference fiber within a given wavelength slice.

PREDICTRATIO.name: PREDICTRATIO
PREDICTRATIO.description: The predicted model ratio of the fiber-to-reference flux generated by the pipeline's Point Spread Function (PSF) model

MODEL.name: MODEL
MODEL.description: The Kurucz model adopted for this star.

TEFF.name: TEFF
TEFF.description: The effective temperature for the adopted model.

G.name: G
G.description: Log g for the adopted model

MAG.name: MAG
MAG.description: Synthetic magnitudes for the model in ugriz bands, normalized to the PSFmag in r-band.

LINESN_MEDIAN.name: LINESN_MEDIAN
LINESN_MEDIAN.description: Median S/N in the absorption lines of interests

LINECHI2.name: LINECHI2
LINECHI2.description: Chi-squared of the fit in the absorption lines of interests

LINEDOF.name: LINEDOF
LINEDOF.description: Degree of Freedom for the absorption lines of interests.
